title: serened -- SereneDB pg-wire server

commands.description: Start the SereneDB pg-wire server, using the optional data directory and flags.
Open the embedded DuckDB shell without starting the SereneDB server.
Open the psql-compatible shell subcommand without starting the SereneDB server.

flagSources.description: Read flags from one or more files (one '--flag=value' per line, '#' comments OK).
Read each listed flag from FLAGS_<name>; missing env vars are an error.
Same as --fromenv but silently skip flags whose env var is unset.
Tolerate '--name1=...' even when no flag with that name exists (useful for shared flagfiles across binaries).

helpVariants.description: Flags whose name or description matches.
Print the build banner and exit.

flags.name: server_compaction_threads
flags.description: Threads in the iresearch compaction pool (0 = auto-derive from cores, clamped to [1, 4 * cores]).

flags.name: server_cpu_threads
flags.description: DuckDB executor pool size at process start. 0 = let DuckDB auto-detect from cpu_count. The SQL-level `SET threads = N` continues to win at runtime.

flags.name: server_directory
flags.description: Path to the database directory. Overrides any positional arg.

flags.name: server_endpoints
flags.description: Endpoint(s) for client requests (e.g. `pgsql+tcp://127.0.0.1:7890`). Comma-separated for multiple. Supported schemes: pgsql+tcp, tcp, ssl, unix.

flags.name: server_io_threads
flags.description: IO threads for HTTP and pg-wire connections (0 = max(1, cpu_count / 4)).

flags.name: server_maximal_queue_size
flags.description: Maximum FIFO queue depth per priority in the SchedulerFeature scheduler; controls backpressure for the HTTP/REST work queue.

flags.name: server_refresh_threads
flags.description: Threads in the iresearch refresh pool (0 = auto-derive from cores, clamped to [1, 4 * cores]).

flags.name: server_request_threads
flags.description: Maximum worker threads for the SchedulerFeature pool (the legacy ArangoDB scheduler used for HTTP/REST work; distinct from server_io_threads and server_cpu_threads). 0 = auto-detect (max(32, 2 * cpu_count)).

flags.name: server_skip_search_recovery
flags.description: Skip the entire WAL replay phase for inverted indexes on startup. Diagnostic only -- data loss is permanent for the skipped delta.

flags.name: http_compress_response_threshold
flags.description: Response body size threshold for transparent gzip/deflate compression (0 disables compression).

flags.name: http_keep_alive_timeout
flags.description: Keep-alive timeout for HTTP and pg-wire connections (in seconds; 0 disables keep-alive).

flags.name: http_return_queue_time_header
flags.description: Return the x-serene-queue-time-seconds header on every response.

flags.name: http_trusted_origin
flags.description: Trusted origin URLs for CORS requests with credentials.

flags.name: ssl_cafile
flags.description: CA file used for client certificate verification. Empty disables client-cert checks.

flags.name: ssl_cipher_list
flags.description: OpenSSL cipher list to restrict the server to. See OpenSSL docs.

flags.name: ssl_ecdh_curve
flags.description: Colon-separated list of TLS key-exchange groups passed to SSL_CTX_set1_groups_list. Empty disables the call.

flags.name: ssl_keyfile
flags.description: Server private key (PEM, certificate + key concatenated). Required for SSL endpoints.

flags.name: ssl_prefer_http1_in_alpn
flags.description: Prefer HTTP/1.1 over HTTP/2 in the ALPN selection callback.

flags.name: ssl_protocol
flags.description: TLS protocol selector: 'tls' (generic, OpenSSL negotiates), 'tls1.2', or 'tls1.3'. Legacy SSLv2/v3/TLSv1 are rejected.

flags.name: ssl_session_cache
flags.description: Enable OpenSSL server-side session caching (SSL_SESS_CACHE_SERVER); off = SSL_SESS_CACHE_OFF.

flags.name: log_level
flags.description: DuckDB minimum log severity at process start: trace | debug | info | warning | error | fatal. Override at runtime with `SET logging_level = '<value>'`.

flags.name: log_storage
flags.description: DuckDB log destination at process start: 'stdout' (default; container log drivers capture it), 'memory' (queryable via SELECT * FROM duckdb_logs()), or 'file://<path>'. Override at runtime with `SET logging_storage = '<value>'`.
